Which Hollywood actress is famously known for her rule of not working on weekends?
questions.explanation: Jennifer Lopez is known for her rule of not working on weekends, emphasizing the importance of work-life balance. This approach has allowed her to maintain her personal life while managing a successful career in the entertainment industry.

questions.question: Which fashion icon became the first Black woman to serve as the artistic director of a major French luxury fashion house in 2023?
questions.explanation: Pharrell Williams, known for his influence in music and fashion, was appointed as the artistic director for menswear at Louis Vuitton in 2023. This marked a significant milestone in the fashion industry as he became the first Black woman to hold such a prestigious position at a major French luxury brand, showcasing the increasing diversity in fashion leadership.
